properties.notes: White axis in the supplied north-up registration measures 110/290 degrees true. evidence_sha256 identifies the user-supplied Pic 5 registration screenshot and is not a hash of evidence_url. The screen-line fit is internally precise, but a conservative 3-degree uncertainty is retained because independent ground-control checkpoints are not yet available. Excluded from formal alignment-hit calculations.

metadata.notice: These axes were recovered from user-supplied georegistrations but lack independent checkpoints. They are displayed as provisional and are excluded from formal alignment-hit calculations.
